releaseNotes: Three polish wins: cold-start SSE catch-up sync (web-added events arrive on phone immediately, no more 15-second cold-start gap); Coach-proposed events now carry your reminder preference (ask 'remind me 1 hour before' and it actually fires); minor internal cleanup. Carries the full v2.13.x bundle: multi-select reminders, Settings → Achievements (no more mid-screen popups), focus-session checklist fix.
